participants.name: Denzel Boston
participants.notes: Projected first-round pick. Did not run a 40-yard dash at pro day at the advice of his agent per Brady Henderson/ESPN. Posted a 37.5-inch vertical jump, bettering his 35-inch combine number. Combine measurements: 6-4, 212, arms 32", hands 9 3/4", shuttle 4.28s, vertical 35". Said he has 12 pre-draft visits lined up, first is the Raiders.

participants.name: Jonah Coleman
participants.notes: Combine measurements: 5-8, 220, arms 28 7/8", hands 9 1/8". Only did bench press (22 reps) at the combine. Expected to do full complement of drills at pro day. NFL Draft Buzz lists his 40 at 4.5 (source unclear if pro day or projected). Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Carver Willis
participants.notes: Combine invite. Combine results: 6-5, 303, arms 32 1/2", hands 9 1/2", 40-yard dash 5.11, 10-yard split 1.84, vertical 26.5", broad jump 9'0" (108 inches). Transferred from Kansas State; played LT at Washington in 2025. Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Ephesians Prysock
participants.notes: Combine invite. Combine results: 6-3, 196, arms 33 1/8", hands 9 3/4", 40-yard dash 4.45, 10-yard split 1.57, vertical 39", broad jump 10'4" (124 inches). Originally transferred from Arizona. Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Tacario Davis
participants.notes: Combine invite. Combine results: 6-4, 194, arms 33 3/8", hands 9 1/4", 40-yard dash 4.41, 10-yard split 1.59, vertical 37", broad jump 10'3" (123 inches). Originally transferred from Arizona. Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Zach Durfee
participants.notes: Not a combine invite. Measured 6-4 3/4, 247.5 lbs at pro day. Posted 39-inch vertical. Said 40-yard dash was unofficially timed in the mid-4.5s; he hoped for 4.49 but was a touch slower. Exact 40 time not officially reported. Transferred from Division II Sioux Falls. Said 'I feel like I crushed it.' Scouts met with him separately after testing.

participants.name: Deshawn Lynch
participants.notes: Not a combine invite. Listed at 6-5, 295 in 247Sports primer. Played two seasons at UW (23 games), 40 total tackles, 6.5 TFL, 2 sacks. Had an interception and 57-yard return in LA Bowl win. Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Anterio Thompson
participants.notes: Not a combine invite. Listed at 6-4, 310 in 247Sports primer. Transferred from Western Michigan. Played in all 13 games in 2025, starting three. 30 total tackles, 2.5 TFL, 1.5 sacks. On Montlake noted he 'tested well.' Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Logan Sagapolu
participants.notes: Listed at 6-2, 348 in 247Sports primer. Played two seasons at UW, 11 total tackles. Fumble recovery vs Michigan in 2024. Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Omari Evans
participants.notes: Not a combine invite. Listed at 6-0, 195 in 247Sports primer. Transferred from Penn State for one season. 17 catches for 254 yards and 1 TD. Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Quentin Moore
participants.notes: Not a combine invite. Tight end who played in 12 of 13 games in 2025 at Washington. Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Makell Esteen
participants.notes: Not a combine invite. Listed at 6-1, 205 in 247Sports primer. Started 18 games in four seasons at UW including 12 in 2025. 120 career tackles in 44 games, 4 TFL, 0.5 sacks. Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Sam Adams II
participants.notes: Listed at 6-2, 212 in 247Sports primer. Graduated after 2024 season (previous class participant). Mostly a special teams player: 31 carries for 82 yards and 1 TD in 31 games over three seasons. SI noted he attended with a shaved head. Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Kai Horton
participants.notes: Listed at 6-4, 222 in 247Sports primer. Played one season at UW after transferring from Tulane. Went 7-13 for 98 yards passing in four games. Also 8 carries for 9 yards and 2 TDs. Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Angel Johnson
participants.notes: Listed on PFF's pro day tracker under Washington (PFF Predictive Big Board Rank: 394). Full pro day results not yet published.

participants.name: Orin Patu
participants.notes: Visiting prospect. Former California, Arizona and Bethune-Cookman defensive end who prepped at Rainier Beach (Seattle). Worked out at Washington's pro day as a visiting player per On Montlake. Full pro day results not yet published.

additional_notes: Washington's Pro Day was held Monday, March 16, 2026 at the Dempsey Indoor Facility in Seattle. Approximately 15 UW players plus at least one visiting prospect (Orin Patu) worked out for representatives from more than half of the NFL and several CFL teams. Five Huskies (Boston, Coleman, Davis, Prysock, Willis) were combine invitees; the rest were not invited. This was a much quieter pro day than 2024, when 10 Huskies from the 2023 CFP championship game run were drafted. Key highlights: Denzel Boston (projected 1st-round pick) did NOT run a 40-yard dash at the advice of his agent but improved his vertical to 37.5 inches from 35 at the combine. Zach Durfee measured 6-4 3/4, 247.5 lbs with a 39-inch vertical and an unofficial 40 in the mid-4.5s. Anterio Thompson was noted as testing well. The event lasted approximately three hours. IMPORTANT: This pro day occurred just hours ago (published 5:27 PM PT on March 16). Comprehensive testing results (exact 40 times, broad jumps, shuttles, 3-cone, bench reps, measurements for all participants) have NOT yet been published by any source. The available data above comes from beat reporter observations (Brady Henderson of ESPN, Christian Caple of On Montlake, Dan Raley of SI). Full results should be available in the coming days as official numbers are disseminated. Heights and weights listed for non-combine participants are from the 247Sports pre-pro-day primer and may be college roster listings rather than official pro day measurements. Data should be updated when full results are released.
